title: Release Runtime Startup
objective: Start a release-shaped OpenClaw runtime, measure cold readiness and bundled runtime dependency staging, and fail on degraded plugin startup.

phases.title: Provision Release Runtime Env
phases.intent: Start OpenClaw from the selected release-shaped runtime and keep probing beyond the expected threshold so slow startups are classified.

phases.title: Post-Start Runtime Checks
phases.intent: Verify the gateway is usable after cold startup and capture plugin registry behavior.

phases.title: Startup Logs And Runtime Deps
phases.intent: Capture dependency staging, missing package/module errors, plugin service failures, and startup timing logs.
